free_text: Typed attachment grid (transposed layout, footer 'MS ARECO Schedule A 12.31.16'): field labels run down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Value of Asset buckets A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000; Type of Income: None/Dividends/Rent/Interest/Capital Gains/Excepted/Blind Trust/Tax-Deferred/Other Type of Income; Amount of Income: Current Year buckets A: None through K: Over $5,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016, same buckets). One asset per column; selections are black-filled cells. Three asset columns on this page with unequal widths; Ticker row blank for all three. EIF row has a checkmark for the York Credit Opportunitites Fund column only ('Opportunitites' spelling as printed). All three columns marked G: $250,001-$500,000 for Value of Asset. York: 'Other Type of Income' selected (no write-in text present). MS BANK NA: Interest. Active Assets Tax Free Trust: Dividends and Interest. Current-year income A: None for all three. Preceding-year income: F: $5,001-$15,000 for York, B: $1-$200 for MS BANK NA and Active Assets Tax Free Trust. Header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank). Cell selections verified by pixel-level row/column alignment on the hires scan.
layout_note: Transposed spreadsheet-style Schedule A attachment: assets as columns, buckets as rows, black-filled cells as selections. Separate current-year and preceding-year income blocks.

uncertainties.note: 'Opportunitites' is the spelling as printed (tesseract agrees); transcribed verbatim
black-filled selection only; no write-in specification text anywhere in the column
